message:
feat(bubbletea-macros): Extend #[state] attribute support for generics and static lifetimes

This commit extends the bubbletea-macros derive macro with additional test
coverage and support for edge cases in the #[state] attribute system.

New Test Cases:
- generic_with_state.rs: Validates #[state] attribute works correctly on
  generic model types with type parameters
- static_lifetime.rs: Validates #[state] attribute works with 'static
  lifetime references in model structs

State Attribute Enhancements:
- Additional logic in state.rs for handling complex generic scenarios
- Ensures the render-triggering field tracking works with advanced type
  system features

The #[state] attribute marks fields that should trigger re-render when
changed, enabling fine-grained control over when view() is called.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
